testcase.name: api session continuity handling > renews once and retries expired GET requests with the new token
api session continuity handling > coalesces concurrent expired GET renewals into one signinSilent call
api session continuity handling > renews expired mutations but does not replay them automatically
api session continuity handling > leaves navigation pending and emits forced reauth for invalid tokens
api session continuity handling > records fallback telemetry before forced reauth for unknown 401 responses
api session continuity handling > throws ApiError for ordinary 403 authorization denial without renewal
api session continuity handling > preserves broker scope redirect behavior without session teardown
api multipart and binary helpers > does not force a JSON content type for multipart requests
api multipart and binary helpers > returns blobs for download helpers without parsing JSON
AuthCallbackPage > redirects broker users to the brokers route after a successful callback
AuthCallbackPage > redirects non-broker users to the dashboard route after a successful callback
AuthCallbackPage > uses the remembered landing route when the exact callback was already completed
AuthCallbackPage > treats an in-flight strict-mode replay as a no-op
AuthCallbackPage > falls back to the remembered landing route when a replayed callback throws after prior success
AuthCallbackPage > clears stale state and redirects to login when the callback fails without a remembered success
AuthCallbackPage > navigates to a safe return_to from OIDC state after draining deferred telemetry
AuthCallbackPage > rejects unsafe return_to values and falls back to the role landing route
LoginPage > renders the Sign In button
LoginPage > shows session_expired notice when reason=session_expired
LoginPage > shows callback_failed error when error=callback_failed
LoginPage > shows misconfiguration error when OIDC env vars are missing
LoginPage > calls oidcUserManager.signinRedirect() when Sign In is clicked
LoginPage > passes return_to through OIDC state when present
LoginPage > shows IdP-unavailable error when signinRedirect throws
useSessionTeardown — reason: session_expired > redirects to /login?reason=session_expired
useSessionTeardown — reason: session_expired > clears OIDC state (removeUser + clearStaleState) before redirecting
useSessionTeardown — reason: session_expired > completes teardown even if POST /auth/logout throws a network error
useSessionTeardown — reason: session_expired > completes teardown even if POST /auth/logout returns a non-2xx status
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > redirects to /login with no query string
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > calls oidcUserManager.removeUser() and clearStaleState()
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > calls POST /auth/logout with correct method and credentials
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > still clears OIDC state and redirects even if logout endpoint call fails
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > clears OIDC state before redirecting
useAuthEventHandler — 401 interceptor wiring > triggers teardown with session_expired when auth event is emitted
useAuthEventHandler — 401 interceptor wiring > unsubscribes from auth events on unmount — no teardown after unmount
IdleWarningModal accessibility > has no axe violations when open
IdleWarningModal > renders the alert dialog with countdown text
IdleWarningModal > calls the selected action handlers
IdleWarningModal > treats Escape as sign out
classifyAuthResponse > uses ProblemDetails as the authoritative token-expired source
classifyAuthResponse > marks conflicts when WWW-Authenticate disagrees with ProblemDetails
classifyAuthResponse > falls back to status-only unknown for malformed 401 responses
classifyAuthResponse > classifies 403 responses as authorization denial when no finer code exists
renewSessionForExpiredToken > coalesces concurrent renewal callers behind one silent sign-in
renewSessionForExpiredToken > blocks immediate renewal loops after success
renewSessionForExpiredToken > maps invalid_grant renewal failures to refresh expiration
session restore helpers > accepts same-origin return paths and rejects unsafe destinations
session restore helpers > stores and consumes a same-user dirty form snapshot once
session restore helpers > clears snapshots by current user and by other users
session continuity telemetry > builds events from non-PII session identity claims
session continuity telemetry > posts buffered events to the protected telemetry endpoint
session continuity telemetry > persists and drains deferred failure-class events by user
session continuity telemetry > drops expired deferred events instead of sending them
useIdleWarning > opens the idle modal at the inactivity threshold and emits shown telemetry
useIdleWarning > renews and closes the modal when the user stays signed in
useIdleWarning > forces reauth when the grace period expires
useIdleWarning > signs out explicitly from the idle modal path
useIdleWarning > does not open the idle modal on public auth routes
